environment.os: ubuntu-24.04 (Linux host; container legs in rust:1.94-bookworm)
notes: Windows workspace-test leg not runnable in this Linux environment; substituted by the Linux host all-features workspace run plus the pinned rust:1.94-bookworm container workspace run (both green).

tools/port/measure_resources.ps1 is PowerShell/Windows-only and was not run; portable composition sizes are test-enforced instead (DoIpEntity<..,6,6,6,64> = 8880 bytes, FakeStack<16,512,32> = 11568 bytes, host x86-64).
Miri not run: this tranche adds no unsafe code and tools/port/inventory_unsafe.py --check confirms the unsafe inventory is unchanged.
Physical HIL is out of scope for this hardware-independent tranche; see docs/port/embedded-doip-2026-07-19.md for the NOT-completed platform list.

commands: docker run rust:1.94-bookworm cargo test --workspace --exclude bsw-bsp-stm32 --all-features --locked
cargo deny check licenses advisories bans sources
